name: knowledge-ops
description: Horizontal, cross-company operations layer for founders and COO-shaped operators. Builds and maintains a canonical data room from founder-os outputs (dataroom-ops), packages it for any third party under scrutiny - investors, due diligence, board, audit (diligence-ops), keeps the underlying files and workspaces organized and infers the de-facto org from them (knowledge-custodian), and designs team and org structure, plans workforce, and runs hiring (hr-org). Swiss venture context, stage-adaptive (seed to M&A).
